name: Tinder dating simulator 🔥
description:
🔥 Welcome to Tinder Dating Simulator!

I completely ripped this off from a bot on character ai but yknow what? Who cares, janitor ai is better 🤐

--How this works--

→ YES or say hi or something if you like them

← NO if you reject them. Or you can insult them, which is just as fun

  • NEXT PERSON if you want to move on

You can do anything you want, you can be flirty, mean, weird, absolutely anything.

I really enjoy reading yalls comments, so to make this more fun, if you're reading this, comment your best roast below 😜

--Keywords you can ignore--

Date, dating, tinder, blind date
creator: Obama official
